examples:
Command Example
!fd-search-tickets updated_since=2019-02-05T08:30:00Z
Context Example
{
"Freshdesk.Ticket": [
{
"Status": 2,
"ResponderID": null,
name: fd-search-tickets

outputs.description: ID number of the fetched ticket Freshdesk.Ticket.Priority Ticket priority
outputs.name: Freshdesk.Ticket.ID

outputs.description: Date Timestamp that denotes when the ticket is due to be resolved Freshdesk.Ticket.Subject
outputs.name: Freshdesk.Ticket.DueBy

outputs.description: User ID of the requester Freshdesk.Ticket.Tag Tags associated with the ticket
outputs.name: Freshdesk.Ticket.RequesterID

outputs.description: ID of the group the ticket was assigned to Freshdesk.Ticket.Source The channel through which the ticket was created
outputs.name: Freshdesk.Ticket.GroupID

outputs.description: ID of the agent the ticket was assigned to Freshdesk.Ticket.FrDueBy Date
outputs.name: Number

outputs.description: Freshdesk.Ticket.Conversation Conversations associated with this ticket Freshdesk.Ticket.Attachment.AttachmentURL
outputs.name: Timestamp that denotes when the first response is due

outputs.description: URL to download the file attached to the ticket to your local machine Freshdesk.Ticket.Attachment.Name The name of the file attached to the ticket
outputs.name: Unknown

outputs.description: Content type of the file attached to the ticket Freshdesk.Ticket.Attachment.ID ID number of the file attached to the ticket
outputs.name: Freshdesk.Ticket.Attachment.ContentType

outputs.description: Size of the file attached to the ticket
outputs.name: Freshdesk.Ticket.Attachment.Size
